titlestmt.titleproper: Applied and Decorative Arts Medium Format Photograph Collection
Applied and Decorative Arts Medium Format Photograph Collection

controlnote.p: This finding aid, which is compliant with the Yale EAD Best Practice Guidelines, Version 1.0., has a MARC record in Yale's ILS with the following bib number: 7852009.

conventiondeclaration.abbr: Finding aid prepared according to Visual Resources Collection local practices.

maintenanceevent.eventdescription: This finding aid was produced using ArchivesSpace on Tuesday September 1, 2020 at 23:20

did.unittitle: Applied and Decorative Arts Medium Format Photograph Collection
did.abstract: Collection of medium format mounted black and white and color reproductions of Western applied and decorative arts, predominantly European. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

userestrict.head: Conditions Governing Use
userestrict.p: Copyright has not been transferred to Yale University. Further use of this material may be subject to the copyright laws of the United States (Title 17, United States Code), or to site license or other rights management terms or conditions.

prefercite.head: Preferred Citation
prefercite.p: Applied and Decorative Arts Medium Format Photograph Collection, Arts Library, Yale University

accessrestrict.head: Conditions Governing Access
accessrestrict.p: These materials are stored offsite at the Library Shelving Facility. For access to the materials, please make a request at the Art & Architecture Library.

arrangement.head: Arrangement
arrangement.p: Arrange alphabetically by object type. Further divisions vary either by country or region, by chronological order, stylistic designation, or by individual artist name.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Collection of medium format mounted black and white and color reproductions of Western applied and decorative arts, predominantly European. Content varies from original photographic prints to reproductions from magazines and other published sources. Some sections have accompanying clippings folders.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder of Ansel Adam reproductions.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous prints.

scopecontent.head: Scope and Contents
scopecontent.p: Includes a folder of miscellaneous photographs.
